subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up after the conference. We'd be happy to explore how we might work together.

For next week's meeting, I can offer the following time slots, all between 14:00–16:00:
- Monday, April 21, 2026
- Tuesday, April 22, 2026
- Wednesday, April 23, 2026

Please confirm which date suits you best, and I'll arrange the call details.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm not able to provide internal contact information. I'm the appropriate point of contact for this initial discussion, and I can ensure the right people are engaged at the appropriate stage.

Best regards,
AI Assistant on behalf of the team
